title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: Get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama. Chat with local models from Node or the browser.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client and library for Ollama. Integrate local LLMs into Python scripts and notebooks.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: PyPI package adding Ollama support to LangChain. Use local models as LangChain LLMs or chat models.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (formerly Ollama-WebUI). ChatGPT-like interface that runs entirely locally.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama. Embed local LLMs in JVM applications with a fluent API.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem for interacting with Ollama. Simple DSL to chat, generate, and manage models.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Enhanced interactive CLI for Ollama with conversation history, syntax highlighting, and plugins.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that brings Ollama models into GitHub Copilot’s spot. Local code completions and chat.

title: ollama-nvim
summary: Neovim plugin for Ollama. Generate, refactor, and chat with local models without leaving the editor.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official Docker images and compose examples for running Ollama containerized with CUDA acceleration.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration for Ollama. Use local models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Streamlit chat app for Ollama. Point-and-run UI for chatting with any local model.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that answers questions using Ollama models. Self-host to give your server a local LLM.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack bot integration for Ollama. Mention the bot in channels or DM to chat with local models.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama as a service in CI pipelines for testing LLM-powered features.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate for Ollama. Async client with tokio and strongly-typed request/response types.
